sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_data (id UInt32, hex_resolution UInt8, geom String, attributes String, area Float64 DEFAULT h3HexAreaKm2(hex_resolution));
SELECT id, area, xIf(geom IS NULL, 'No Geometry', 'Has Geometry') AS geom_status FROM geo_data WHERE area < h3HexAreaKm2(14);
SELECT AVG(area) AS avg_area, multiIf(hex_resolution = 0, 'Lowest', hex_resolution = 15, 'Highest', 'Medium') AS resolution_category FROM geo_data GROUP BY resolution_category HAVING avg_area > 0.1;
SELECT id, geom, h3HexAreaKm2(xIf(hex_resolution IS NULL, 0, hex_resolution)) AS calculated_area FROM geo_data ORDER BY calculated_area DESC;
SELECT id, area, geom, xIf(geom LIKE 'some%', 'Prefix Match', 'No Prefix') AS match_status FROM geo_data WHERE area BETWEEN h3HexAreaKm2(0) AND h3HexAreaKm2(15) ORDER BY match_status, area LIMIT 10;
CREATE TABLE temp_area AS SELECT id, area FROM geo_data WHERE area IS NOT NULL ORDER BY area DESC;
SELECT id, area, xIf(geom IS NOT NULL, h3HexAreaKm2(1) * 0.5, 0) AS scaled_area FROM geo_data WHERE area > 0.1;
SELECT geom, SUM(area) OVER (PARTITION BY geom ORDER BY id) AS cumulative_area FROM geo_data;
